description_long: This ornate sconce features a central vertical stem that extends downward to support three outwardly curving arms, each ending in a flared, tulip-shaped glass shade. The arms are symmetrically arranged and adorned with hanging crystal pendants, adding a touch of elegance and sparkle. The stem and arms appear to be crafted from a metallic material with a polished finish, while the shades are likely frosted or translucent glass. Decorative elements such as faceted crystals and intricate metalwork are visible, enhancing the luxurious appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of classic or vintage lighting fixtures often found in upscale urban interiors or historic buildings. The sconce is intended to be mounted on a ceiling, providing both illumination and decorative appeal.
description: An ornate, vintage-style ceiling sconce with three glass shades, metallic arms, and hanging crystal pendants.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three glass shades and the symmetrical arrangement of crystal pendants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the flared glass shades and the curvature of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the central stem and all three shades visible, but less detail on the crystal pendants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the profile of the shades and the elegant arm curvature.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, with classic curves, flared glass shades, and decorative crystal pendants reminiscent of early 20th-century or Victorian styles.
